channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: A Trump order asked national park visitors to flag ‘negative’ historical info. They had other ideas
item.description: The Trump administration recently asked visitors to U.S. national parks to report displays or exhibits saying “negative” things about Americans and to restore sites as “uplifting public monuments.”

item.title: Defying Trump ended some Republicans’ careers. It could help Susan Collins win reelection in Maine
Democrat Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton will face off in California governor’s race
